title: ChestTrack
description: ChestTrack is a smart proximity radar that scans nearby inventories and triggers glowing particles over chests containing the specific item you are looking for.
body:
ChestTrack is an essential tool for players who have a lot of storage. Instead of searching through each chest, use the scanner to locate your resources.

Visual Signal: Glow particles appear in chests containing the sought-after item.

Simple Use: Press your shortcut key (default Y) to open the menu.

Search by ID: Enter the technical ID of the item (e.g., minecraft:diamond) to start detection.

Search by Item: Place your item in the slot to start detection.

Tip:
Use F3+H in the game to see advanced tooltips and easily find item IDs!

Works with ALL blocks that have an inventory, but those from other mods.

made with MCreator

Important Note: This mod currently uses Minecraft's technical IDs. Make sure to type the full ID (e.g., minecraft:apple) for the radar to work.
